commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8c40a44c995e66a2fc1f23efb59f2276d781c238)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared endpoint override validation for MiniMax and Alibaba usage providers, fails invalid overrides, updates diagnostics, tests, and provider docs.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main accepts arbitrary MiniMax and Alibaba override authorities, and the PR diff adds allowlist and fail-closed checks before fetches. I did not run live provider probes because AGENTS.md says credentialed provider probes require explicit request.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers include contributor-owned real behavior proof and a maintainer security/compatibility decision, not only a mechanical code edit.

target.title: [security] fix(providers): validate sibling endpoint overrides
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a shared provider endpoint override validator for sibling usage providers.
- Restrict MiniMax and Alibaba endpoint overrides to their expected provider domains.
- Reject non-HTTPS schemes, embedded userinfo, and percent-encoded host delimiters before credentials are attached to follow-up requests.
- Add focused regression coverage for rejected attacker hosts, encoded-delimiter bypasses, rejected `http://` overrides, rejected `user:pass@` URLs, and accepted provider-owned HTTPS/bare host overrides.
- Update MiniMax and Alibaba provider docs to make the provider-owned HTTPS-only override contract explicit.

## Compatibility note
This intentionally treats explicit `http://...` endpoint overrides as invalid, even for otherwise provider-owned hosts. These settings carry cookies or API credentials into provider requests, so preserving insecure HTTP compatibility would keep a credential-disclosure footgun. Bare host overrides such as `platform.minimaxi.com` and provider HTTPS URLs remain supported; callers that need a custom endpoint should use HTTPS on a provider-owned hostname. Arbitrary proxy/test domains are intentionally no longer supported for these credentialed provider paths.

## Validation
- `swift .hermes_endpoint_override_smoke.swift` — passed with `endpoint override smoke passed`; the temporary smoke file exercised MiniMax and Alibaba accepted provider hosts/URLs plus rejected `http://`, userinfo, and encoded-delimiter bypass cases, then was removed.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `make check` — SwiftFormat lint mode passed (`0/998 files require formatting`); SwiftLint was blocked by the existing local SourceKit issue (`Loading sourcekitdInProc.framework/Versions/A/sourcekitdInProc failed`).
- `swift test --filter 'MiniMaxEndpointOverrideSettingsTests|AlibabaCodingPlanSettingsReaderTests'` — blocked before the focused tests by the existing local `KeyboardShortcuts`/SwiftUI `#Preview` macro toolchain issue (`PreviewsMacros` plugin not found).
target.author: hinotoi-agent
